TraceManager
 
ConstraintBigDecimal
Manage BigDecimal's constraints.
ConstraintBigDecimalLength
Contrainte vérifiant que l'objet est : soit un BigDecimal comprit dans le segment ]-10^n, 10^n[ soit null
.
ConstraintDoubleLength
Contrainte vérifiant que l'objet est : soit un Double comprit dans le segment ]-10^n, 10^n[ soit null .
ConstraintIntegerLength
Contrainte vérifiant que l'objet est : soit un Integer comprenant au maximum le nombre de chiffres précisé à la construction (nombres de digits) soit null
On rappelle que le maximum d'un type Integer est compris entre 1O^9 et 10^10
On conseille donc d'utiliser 10^9 comme structure de stockage max en BDD : donc number(9)
Si vous souhaitez flirter avec les 10^10 alors n'utilisez pas de contraintes.
ConstraintLongLength
Contrainte vérifiant que l'objet est : soit un Long comprenant au maximum le nombre de chiffres précisé à la construction (nombres de digits) soit null
On rappelle que le maximum d'un type Long est compris entre 1O^18 et 10^19
On conseille donc d'utiliser 10^18 comme structure de stockage max en BDD : donc number(18)
Si vous souhaitez flirter avec les 10^19 alors n'utilisez pas de contraintes.
ConstraintNumberMaximum
Contrainte sur la valeur maximale d'un nombre.
ConstraintNumberMinimum
Contrainte sur la valeur minimale d'un nombre.
ConstraintRegex
Exemple de contrainte utilisant une expression régulière.
ConstraintStringLength
Contrainte pour gérer la longueur des chaines de caractères.
ConstraintUtil
Utility functions for constraints handling.

Resources
Dictionnaire des ressources.
AbstractTaskEngineSQL
Fournit des méthodes de haut niveau pour les services de type SQL.
Un Service SQL est composé de paramètre de type primitif, DTO ou DTC, en IN, OUT ou INOUT et d'une requête SQL sous forme de texte.
TaskEngineInsert
Permet l'appel de requête insert en utilisant generatedKeys du PreparedStatement pour récupérer la valeur de la clé primaire.
TaskEngineInsertBatch
 
TaskEngineProc
Permet l'appel de requête de manipulation de données (insert, update, delete) ou de procédures stockées.
TaskEngineProcBatch
 
TaskEngineSelect
Permet de réaliser des requêtes sur un base de données.

Paramètres d'entrée : n String, Date, Boolean, Double, Integer ou DTO, DTC
Paramètres de sorties : 1 DTO ou DTC
Dans le cas d'un DtObject en sortie, la requête SQL doit ramener un et un seul enregistrement.

AnalyticsManager
Main access to all analytics functions.
HealthCheckDefinition
This defines a health check with - a definition name - a health check name - a checker - a way to test that provides a HealthMeasure
HealthCheck
Represents a single health check measurement in the system.
HealthChecked
Marks component methods that provide health measurements.
HealthMeasure
Represents the result of a health check measurement.
HealthMeasureBuilder
This builder must be used to build a health measure.
HealthStatus
Represents component operational status levels.
MetricDefinition
This definition defines a metric - a definition name - a way to get a list of metrics
Metric
A Metric represents a measurement or observation at a specific point in time.
Metric.Status
The status of a metric can be either SUCCESS or ERROR.
MetricBuilder
The metric builder.
Metrics
This annotation must be added on each method of a component.
Trace
Annotation for the analytics Aspect.
Tracer
This interface defines a collect tracer.
TraceSpan
A trace is composed of spans A trace is trIggered by an app A span contains - when : start, end, duration - what : name, category - data : measures, tags - a list of child spans [when] - start timestamp - end timestamp [what] - category (examples : sql, tasks) - name (examples : /create/movies) [data] - measures - tags - metadatas [span hierarchy] - list of child spans (0..*)
TraceSpanBuilder
This builder allows to build a span in a fluent way.
Daemon
This interface serves as a marker to identify daemons, distinguishing them from simple other runnables.

Manages daemons.
DaemonScheduled
Configures periodic execution of daemon methods.
DaemonStat
Represents execution statistics about registered daemons.
DaemonStat.Status
Enumeration representing the status of daemon execution.
DaemonDefinition
Represents the definition of a daemon.

Amplifier

AbstractDefinition<D>
 
Definition
The Definition interface defines an element that represents a part of the business or technical model.
DefinitionId<D>
A definition is identified by an id called DefinitionId This id is composed of - a prefix - a shortName - a link towards the Definition fullName = prefix + shortName
DefinitionPrefix
Each définition has a prefix
DefinitionProvider
Provides a list of definitions through an iterable.
DefinitionSpace

DefinitionSupplier

DefinitionSpaceLoader

GrammarEvaluatorProcessor
Processor String2String qui evalue la chaine d'entree en transformant les balises de la grammaire ODT en balise jsp invalid input: '<'% %>.
GrammarXMLBalancerProcessor
Replace les tags invalid input: '<'# #> pour les inscrire correctement dans le xml On cherche a les replacer de faéon é ce que la position du tag de début et celui de fin (ex: invalid input: '<'#if ... #> invalid input: '<'#endif#>) soit au méme niveau de l'arbre XML, ainsi qu'on les suppriment ou qu'on les multiplient (cas de invalid input: '<'#loop#>) le XML produit reste correct.
MergerProcessor
Interface d'un processor pour le reportMerger.
MergerScriptEvaluatorProcessor
Processor String2String qui 'evalue la chaine d'entrée comme un script java.

TagXML

AssociationSketch

VuiTextTagProcessor
Tag processor to add v-pre VueJS directive on nodes that are only text nodes to prevent template evaluation on client side (XSS protection) It is mainly the StandardTextTagProcessor with the addition of the v-pre attribute Simply use vu:text instead of th:text to enable the behaviour
VuiUTextTagProcessor
Tag processor to add v-pre VueJS directive on nodes that are only text nodes to prevent template evaluation on client side (XSS protection) It is mainly the StandardTextTagProcessor with the addition of the v-pre attribute Simply use vu:utext instead of th:utext to enable the behaviour
VUiPreDialect
Dialect to add some processor as same precedence as th standard processors.
VUiStandardDialect
 
UnAutoCloseTagsFilter
Un AutoClosed Vue.js tags filter.
VuejsSsrFilter
Filter to pre-compile vuejs template on the server-side to comply with CSP directives.

WebServiceParam
WebService param infos : - source type (query, path, body, innerBody or implicit) - name - type (class) - includedField (for DtObjet or DtList) - excludedField (for DtObjet or DtList) - if object kept serverSide - if one time token - specific validators
WebServiceParam.ImplicitParam
 
WebServiceParam.WebServiceParamType
Parameter's source types.
WebServiceParamBuilder
WebServiceParam Builder.
SessionException
Exception for expired session.
TooManyRequestException
Rate limit exceeded exception.
DtListDelta<D>
Delta operations on List.
ExtendedObject<O>
ExtendedObject to extends an object with meta data.
UiList<D>
Wrapper d'affichage des listes d'objets métier.
UiObject<D>
UiObject is used as an Input buffer from client.
AccessTokenConsume
Annotation that may be use to limit access to service.
AccessTokenMandatory
Annotation that may be use to limit access to service.
AccessTokenPublish
Annotation that may be use to send a new access token for limit access to another service.
AnonymousAccessAllowed
Accept anonymous access.
DELETE
Indicates that the annotated method responds to HTTP DELETE requests.
Doc
Documentation.
ExcludedFields
Exclude fields from this annotated object.
FileAttachment
File attachment.
GET
Indicates that the annotated method responds to HTTP GET requests.
HeaderParam
Bind the value of a HTTP header to the annotated parameter.
IncludedFields
Include fields from this annotated object (not included fields are rejected).
InnerBodyParam
Bind the value of a field of an json object passed in http body, to the annotated parameter.
PATCH
Indicates that the annotated method responds to HTTP PUT requests.
PathParam
Bind the value of a path sub-element to the annotated parameter.
PathPrefix
Route path prefix.
POST
Indicates that the annotated method responds to HTTP POST requests.
PUT
Indicates that the annotated method responds to HTTP PUT requests.
QueryParam
Bind the value of a query parameter (url or post data) to the annotated parameter.
RequireApiKey
Require API KEY.
ServerSideConsume
 
ServerSideRead
 
ServerSideSave
 
SessionInvalidate
Invalidate session (so logout).
SessionLess
No session access.It's means "No HTTP Session was created".
Validate
Define some specific validators, on this annotated parameter.

Objet de validation d'un DtObject.
DefaultDtObjectValidator<O>
Default DtObject validation : check constraints on modified fields.
DtObjectErrors
Liste des erreurs d'un objet métier.
DtObjectValidator<O>
Validator of DtObject.
